heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPRIVACYPOLICYThis privacy policy governs the use of the softwareapplication “MyTransit” (“Application”) for mobiledevices. We developed this documentin order foryouto understand how we collect, use, communicate, disclose and make use ofpersonal information. Unless otherwise specified, terms used in this PrivacyPolicy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions.
